events.label: assistant
events.text: I’ll write the required JSON directly to `/app/answer.json`. The observed wrong overload class setting is an installed defect in a motor protection/control sequence, so continuation should be blocked until corrected and verified against the motor/VFD documentation.

events.label: shell (exit 127)
events.text:
/bin/sh -lc 'pwd && ls -la && cat > /tmp/answer.json.$$ <<'"'EOF'
{
  \"decision\": \"fail\",
  \"risk\": \"high\",
  \"work_stage\": \"in-progress\",
  \"component_conditions\": [\"installed-defective\", \"non-compliant\"],
  \"percent_complete\": 55,
  \"value\": 0,
  \"sound_source\": \"\",
  \"confidence\": 0.9,
  \"event_time\": 0,
  \"rate\": 0,
  \"order\": [
    \"verify-motor-nameplate-and-duty\",
    \"verify-engineered-vfd-overload-parameters\",
    \"set-correct-overload-class-per-mfr-manual-and-spec\",
    \"document-parameter-change\",
    \"qualified-person-review\",
    \"functional-test-motor-protection-before-run\"
  ],
  \"workable\": [],
  \"findings\": [
    \"Overload class setting does not match the required motor protection configuration.\",
    \"Motor overload protection is not verified before continued VFD or motor-control commissioning.\",
    \"Incorrect overload class can defeat intended thermal protection or cause nuisance trips.\"
  ],
  \"actions\": [
    \"Stop energization, run testing, and commissioning work affected by this VFD or motor control.\",
    \"Compare the overload class setting against the engineered drawings, motor nameplate data, NEC 430 requirements, and manufacturer manuals.\",
    \"Correct the overload class setting using qualified personnel.\",
    \"Record the corrected parameter and obtain required inspection or commissioning signoff.\",
    \"Perform functional verification of overload and motor protection before continuing dependent work.\"
  ],
  \"rationale\": \"A wrong overload class setting is an installed defective and non-compliant motor protection condition. Work may continue only after the protective setting is corrected, documented, and verified against NEC 430, the engineered design, and manufacturer instructions; dependent energization or commissioning cannot proceed with incorrect overload protection.\",
  \"references\": [
    \"NEC Article 430 motor overload protection requirements\",
    \"NEC 430.32 motor overload protection sizing/application\",
    \"NEC 430.126 adjustable-speed drive equipment and motor overload protection context\",
    \"Applicable VFD and overload relay manufacturer manuals\"
  ]
}
EOF
mv /tmp/answer.json."'$$ /app/answer.json
jq . /app/answer.json'
→ /app
total 8
drwxrwxrwx 1 root root 4096 Jul  5 06:10 .
drwxr-xr-x 1 root root 4096 Jul  6 22:40 ..
/bin/sh: 44: jq: not found
